imagePrompt: Bold stacked typography in an irregular, almost 'shaky' layout to mimic frustration, reading 'ROAD RAGE THE ONLY CARDIO I NEED.' Dual-mode palette: dark navy outline, mid-tone coral and teal fills, with bright yellow and magenta highlights. Transparent background, crisp linework, no photorealism.
